Your skill comes t0 the attention of the local governor (Contact (21, Good Reputation. Protocol/Clan +2] [Choose one event or roll twice and apply both results]
FREEBORN SIBKO Clan Affiliation only Though they still regard trueborns as vastly superior war- riors, most Clans have come to realize that some freeborns can also excel in combat. Those freeborns who prove them: selves fit for warrior training are put through grueling pro gram designed to make them the best warriors they can be_ Casualties in these programs tend to run high_ along with the number of dropouts_ The losses are exacerbated by the tact that most of the training officers have Iittle regard for their charges and would as happily see them dead as see them pass their Trials of Position. Attrlbute Minimums: BOD DEX RFL 3_ WIL 4, SOC 6 Attrlbute Thresholds: BOD +1 WIL +1 Tralts: Well-Equipped (2), Quirk/Clan Honor; Stigma, Freebirth Warrior, Promotion (to Rank 2) Also Vehicle (21, unless the character chooses the Infantry Field_ Skills: Career /Soldier +3, First Aid +2, Interest/Clan Remembrance +2, Brawling +4 Navigation /Ground +2, Pistols +2 choose one: Academic/ Any +1 Interest/Any +1 Streetwise /Clan Flelds: Basic Training and Cavalry or Basic Training and Infantry Clan Aerospace Pilot, Clan Elemental or Clan MechWarrior. All field skills start with 3 Skill Points; the player may also add +1 to any two field skills_ Next Path: Police Academy (3), Tour of Duty: Clan (4)
Freeborn Sibko Events You caused the needless death of trueborn war (Bad Reputation (21, Enemy (21, and you wash out of training] Too weak t0 become warrior [Glass Jaw; Academic / Any +1_ -1 Skill Point to all skills gained from your Military Fields and you wash out of train: ing] You don" have what takes Or at least what they say takes [Timid Bureaucracy/Clan +2, and you wash out of training] Your training officers give you special attention [Introvert, Brawling +13 You sneak out of camp occasion [Escape Artist Fast Talk +1, Skill Point to ay three skills gained from your Military Fields] Like typical freebirth; you take Up stravag hobby (Choose one: Academic /Any +2 , Art/Any +2 Interest/Any 2, Gambling +2 Strategy +1] You took the worst they could throw at You and came back for more [Brave] Natura leader [Good Reputation_ Leadership +2_ Bureaucracy/Clan +21 You pass your Trial of Position with two kills [Commission (Rank 1), Good Reputation_ Vehicle (31, Custom Vehicle] You pass your Trial of Position with three kills! [Commission (Rank 3). Good Reputation (2). Vehicle (5), Custom Vehicle (21]
FARM Your parents couldn t afford t0 send you off t0 school the academy, SO you stayed on at the farm_ Season after sea son , yoU saw your friends go offplanet while you worked your butt off in the fields You planned to join them someday: Skllls: Animal Handling +2, Career/Farming +1 Piloting /Tracked +1, Piloting /Wheeled +1_ Rifles +1 Next Path: Military Enlistment (3), Ne'er-Do-Well (4).
